title: Remote Control Dinosaur Jurassic T Rex Toys for Boys Electronic RC Spray Raptor Walking Roaring Tyrannosaurus Rex Realistic 18.1" Rechargeable Birthday Gift for Kids Girls 3 4 5 6 7
features: 🦖【2025 Upgraded Multi-function Robot spray Dinosaur for Boys】The Dinosaur toys aim to promote interaction and communication among children. This RC Dinosaur toy is great for developing the multi-skills along with the enhancement of child's imagination, creativity, and role-playing skills. The body and tail can be flexibly swung, auto open and close mouth, and the functions of forward, backward, left and right can be realized by remote control. After water is injected into the top of the head, the dinosaur's mouth can auto spray fog.

🦖 【Super Value Realistic Walking RC Dinosaur Toy for Kids 1+7PCS】 This realistic dinosaur toy is able to walk flexibly indoor and outdoor, use the remote controller to make it action, there will be simulated sound out of it, which makes you feel you're at Jurassic Journey! dinosaur family has been added to the children's dinosaur world, including a brachiosaurus, a spinosaurus, a stegosaurus, two trees and two rocks.

🦖 【18.1-Inch/46cm Dinosaur Toy Realistic, High-Quality Dinosaur for Ultimate Fun】Skip the small, low-quality dinosaurs! BUBUQE offers a stunning 18.1-inch dinosaur with 3D lifelike eyes, a realistic walking motion, and Jurassic-inspired colors and design. Unlike 8- or 13-inch models with limited features and rough finishes, this dinosaur captivates kids with a true-to-life experience, transporting them into a world of imagination and adventure. Perfect for sparking hours of endless, realistic play!

🔋【Rechargeable RC Raptor Toy】Super long playback time-equipped with rechargeable battery, 2 hours charging time can last up to 60 minutes uninterrupted operation. With USB charging cable. Remote controller requires 2x1.5V 'AA' (not included). Allowing your kids to experience a longer and uninterrupted gaming time. The one-click demo function allows younger children to experience the infinite fun of dinosaurs.This dinosaur toy is perfect for autistic children.

⚙【Easy to Install and Use】Install the left and right hand into the hole and tighten it clockwise with the screwdriver. Detachable tail into hole while pressing the spring button.Install 2 x AA batteries on the remote control, filling the dinosaur's head with water, then turn on the power of dinosaur and remote control to play. Please refer to the pictures or instructions for specific operation steps.
description: Product Description Bring You Back to the Unparalleled Ancient Times, Remote Control Dinosaur, Led Light Up Walking & Roaring Velociraptor. Children all over the world seem to have one thing in common, that is, at a certain period of time, they suddenly have a soft spot for dinosaurs. Dinosaur picture books, dinosaur toys, dinosaur museum... attract the attention of countless children, and the big image becomes the first friend of countless children. Children are naturally curious about creatures like dinosaurs. Imagine the special existence of dinosaurs: huge body, extraordinary strength, many kinds and different personalities. At this time, the dinosaur has become a perfect object, bringing unlimited imagination to children, accompany them to experience things they have never experienced before, and generate many fantastic ideas in the process of exploration. Their small bodies are full of worship for strength and heroes, hoping that the weak can become stronger, or they believe that a hero will protect him in the dark. The dinosaur satisfies all their imaginations, a powerful and brave image. Dinosaur Paradise Every child is a dinosaur fan, he really wanted a dinosaur toy. This large remote-controlled dinosaur toy can stimulate children's imagination. An educational dinosaur toy can help kids learn dinosaur knowledge and prehistoric culture. Dinosaur toys are the suitable gift for 3 4 5 6 7 8+ year old kids, surprise on children's birthday, Halloween, Christmas. Dinosaur toy is a surprise for the kids age 3-5. 1X Brachiosaurus 1X Spinosaurus 1X Stegosaurus 2X Trees 2X Rocks Best Gift for Boys and Girls 1 X Dinosaur Toys 1 X Manual 1 X USB Cable 1 X Remote Control 1 X Water bottle 1 X Portable Gift Box 1 X Attractive &Portable gift box makes our dinosaur toy very suitable as a gift. 18.1 Inch Long Body 2.4G Five Channels Action Lasted Two Hours Velociraptor built-in rechargeable battery Controller requires 2 “AA” batteries (not included) Realistic Dinosaur Roaring Shaking Head and Walking function Wonderful Operating Experience Brachiosaurus Brachiosaurus lived in the Jurassic period and is a sauropod dinosaur. They are 26 meters in length, 12 to 16 meters in height, and weigh about 30 tons. They are the tallest dinosaurs with a complete skeleton that have been discovered so far, and they are also one of the largest and heaviest dinosaurs ever seen on earth. Their biggest feature is their huge forelimbs, which is why they are called "brachiosaurus". Spinosaurus Spinosaurus is a well-known giant carnivorous theropod dinosaur. It lived in the Late Cretaceous from about 112 million years ago to 93 million years ago. It has an adult body length of 11-15 meters and a weight of 4-10 tons. A freshwater aquatic theropod dinosaur with a suspension bridge-shaped or round-sail-shaped back, a series of characteristics adapted to aquatic environments, and a gait different from conventional bipedal theropods. It is also the longest known theropod dinosaur. Stegosaurus Stegosaurus is a huge herbivorous dinosaur. It is a herbivorous animal that lived in the late Jurassic period. It has a row of huge bony plates on its back and a dangerous tail with four spikes for defense. The attack of predators is about 7-9 meters long, 2.35 meters to 3.5 meters high, and 2 to 4 tons in weight.
